results.requirement_text: The system shall complete nightly report generation before 6:00 AM local time.

test_cases.title: Nightly Report Generation Completion Time
test_cases.objective: Verify that nightly report generation completes before 6:00 AM local time
test_cases.technique_used: Measure elapsed time from generation start to completion and compare against 6:00 AM deadline
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.
System clock is synchronized to the defined local time zone

steps.action: Measure the elapsed time from the start of nightly report generation to its completion
steps.expected_result: The elapsed time is less than the time difference between the current system time and 6:00 AM local time

test_cases.expected_result: Nightly report generation completes before 6:00 AM local time
assumptions: Nightly report generation is initiated automatically at a consistent time each night
Details of the reporting output to determine when generation has completed are available
